revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers | text = quantify | class = Template-Fact | title = {{{reason|This term requires quantification.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with unsourced statements }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles with unsourced statements]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers | text = quantify | class = Template-Fact | title = {{{reason|This term requires quantification.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with unsourced statements }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
[[Category:All articles with unsourced statements]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
